descriptors.name: residual stress state
descriptors.physical_meaning: internal stress distribution without external loads
descriptors.rationale: stress tensor fully characterizes residual stress field

representation.encoding: six independent tensor components per point
representation.notes: N spatial points, symmetric stress tensor

quality.loss_reason: spatial discretization loses continuous field information
quality.notes: finite sampling cannot capture all spatial variations

descriptors.name: phase composition
descriptors.physical_meaning: relative amount of each phase present
descriptors.rationale: volume fractions define phase distribution completely

representation.notes: M phases, simplex constraint reduces dimension

quality.notes: complete representation for spatially averaged composition

descriptors.name: grain size
descriptors.rationale: single value summarizes grain population size

quality.loss_reason: discards entire size distribution beyond mean
quality.notes: many distributions share same mean value

descriptors.name: grain boundary character
descriptors.physical_meaning: distribution of grain boundary misorientation angles

quality.truncation_error: discretization error proportional to bin width
quality.notes: loses spatial correlations between grain boundaries

descriptors.name: crystallographic texture
descriptors.rationale: spherical harmonics form complete basis for functions

representation.notes: truncated at degree L for cubic symmetry

quality.notes: well-controlled approximation with known convergence properties

descriptors.name: dislocation density
descriptors.physical_meaning: total line length of dislocations per volume
descriptors.rationale: scalar summarizes dislocation content in material

quality.loss_reason: spatial distribution and dislocation types lost
quality.truncation_error: all microstructural detail beyond total density

quality.loss_reason: size distribution, shape, and spatial correlations lost
distribution of aspect ratios and orientation lost
quality.notes: different grain populations yield same average

quality.loss_reason: spatial distribution and network topology lost
quality.notes: ignores twin boundary connectivity and arrangement
